title: Dylon Black & Dark Caps (40 Wash Loads), Dylon Black Caps for all Clothes, Dark Colour Washing Pods to Protect Darker Colours, renewing in every wash with optimal results in 10 washes
features: Cares for Colours: Dylon Black & Dark: Colour Caps Laundry Detergent not only cleans gently, but it also renews black & dark colours and fibres
Renews Fibres: Dylon transforms your faded and worn-out dark clothes into looking and feeling like new

Triple Renew Technology: With a Triple Renew Formula, the dark clothes detergent provides Colour Renewal, reviving dull darks, Fibre Renewal, removing pills and fuzz, and Freshness Renewal, cleaning gently
Care For The Planet: Dylon Caps are made of 93% biodegradable ingredients; the caps are 100% water soluble
Easy to Use: Just open the container of the detergent for black clothes and place one cap in the washing drum; then add laundry and start the washing cycle
description: Product Description New? No, washed with Dylon Black: Colour Caps. Discover the convenient laundry caps format with its innovative 3-chamber formula - the optimum care for dark clothes. This washing machine detergent not only gently cleans but also provides care for your colours and fibres: it removes fuzzing and pilling resulting in a smooth and flawless surface and it makes your colours vibrant - so your clothes feel and look like new. All this is combined with a great fragrance, that provides long-lasting freshness. The dark clothing detergent caps can be used in temperatures even colder than 40 down to 20C and is suitable for sensitive skin. Dylon clothes detergent caps are safe for use on a variety of fabrics. Dylon Black & Dark Caps cleans gently + renews colours & fibres. For all black & dark clothes. Choose Dylon, the colour detergent that goes beyond ordinary cleaning, and give your dark clothes the care they deserve. Our innovative formula renews the colours and smoothes rough fibres so that your clothes feel and look like new. Care for your clothes and for the planet: The clothing washing liquid caps formula consists of 93% biodegradable ingredients and 100% water-soluble film. Dylon Dark Caps - for dark and black clothes that look and feel like new. Our plant operates with 100% renewable electrcity and has zero production waste to landfill. Warning: Causes serious eye irritation. Keep out of reach of children. [Add the AISE icon.]. Ingredients 5-15% anionic surfactants, <5% soap, non-ionic surfactants, phosphonates. Further ingredients: Perfumes (Citronellol, Hexyl cinnamal), preservation agents (Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone), Enzymes. Manufacturer Contact Information UK: Henkel Ltd., Wood Lane End, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, HP2 4RQ, United Kingdom. IRL: Henkel Ireland Distribution Ltd., Tallaght Business Park, Whitestown, Dublin 24, D24 YH42, Ireland. See more
